category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Tarantool as getting data in RAM and compute close to data; source_facts.description says in-memory database and Lua application server.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and repository name use Tarantool; source_facts.name is tarantool.
docs_sources: Official tarantool.io documentation page is a dedicated documentation site with tutorials, references, API, internals, and release sections.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository tarantool/tarantool is linked from Tarantool materials and describes the core Tarantool project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an in-memory database and Lua application server; official docs include database, SQL, Lua module, and API reference sections.
